title: Worlds Collide
what: A six-episode YouTube Original series developed for Netflix's digital platforms, designed to connect existing titles and introduce new releases through a unified narrative concept. The format built a theory-driven storyline that crossed multiple catalog titles, framing them within a shared cinematic universe and encouraging audience speculation and participation. The content strategy was grounded in platform data analysis, focusing on audience engagement patterns and retention metrics.
myRole: I acted as Production and Content Manager, leading the creative team from concept development to final delivery. I oversaw format creation, script development, graphic package, sound and video editing, and the promotional rollout. I structured the content strategy based on platform data insights, aligning narrative construction with engagement and retention goals. I coordinated multidisciplinary teams and ensured cohesive execution across creative and operational fronts.

seo.metaTitle: Worlds Collide - Netflix Original Series | Caio Fochetto
seo.metaDescription: Production & Content Manager for Netflix's YouTube Original series connecting catalog titles through data-driven storytelling.

title: Tododia Social Content Platform
what: Structuring and producing an ongoing social media content platform for the Tododia line, operating as a creative studio partner to Agência África. The project combined strategic pre-planning (definition of products and target audiences per fragrance), two major annual production days to generate a proprietary photo and video asset bank, and monthly always-on content rollouts. The core objective was to translate texture, freshness, and sensorial qualities into visual language, enhancing the product's tactile perception in digital environments.
myRole: I acted as Creative Director and Production Manager, leading a multidisciplinary team. I collaborated with the producer on casting decisions aligned with each fragrance's target audience, worked closely with the art director on visual construction, and coordinated the hiring of a freelance image capture professional. I oversaw wardrobe, props, timelines, and deliveries. Together with the team, I structured technical studio solutions to enhance creaminess, consistency, and freshness under high-temperature lighting conditions, ensuring packaging fidelity and greater visual control for the brand's long-term use of the asset bank.

seo.metaTitle: Tododia Social Content Platform - Natura | Caio Fochetto
seo.metaDescription: Creative Director leading sensorial visual content production for Natura's Tododia line in partnership with Agência África.

title: Follow My Voice
what: A campaign created for International Women's Day through a partnership between Havaianas and Netflix to launch a product inspired by the female protagonists of Netflix series. The challenge was to connect the concept of 'heroines' with real women, avoiding the distance between fictional superpowers and everyday strength. The solution was the creation of the Follow My Voice platform, featuring four real women whose personal journeys echoed archetypes of Netflix protagonists. The campaign was developed in three languages and deployed across multiple platforms, preserving Havaianas' Brazilian creative identity while ensuring global resonance.
myRole: I led production and content development at Playground, overseeing the project from concept to execution. I coordinated creative and operational teams, managing filming, timelines, and multiplatform deliverables. I supervised script development, production, and content adaptations across formats, ensuring narrative cohesion between both brands and strategic localization into three languages while maintaining cultural authenticity and global alignment.

seo.metaTitle: Follow My Voice - Havaianas x Netflix | Caio Fochetto
seo.metaDescription: Production lead for International Women's Day campaign connecting Netflix heroines with real women across three languages.

title: Passion 4 Jazz Podcast
what: An eight-episode season dedicated to the history and key icons of Jazz, originally conceived as an audio podcast and structured as a comprehensive editorial platform. The production took place during the pandemic, with recordings concentrated within a single week, multiple guests, and strict health and safety protocols, with no COVID cases reported during filming. Although initially planned as an audio format, the project was fully captured on video, enabling format expansion and a complete audiovisual release.
myRole: I acted as Executive Producer and assumed the role of showrunner during production. I was responsible for budgeting, scheduling, studio and freelancer hiring, vendor management, and overall recording operations. I led script development alongside the creative team, supported direction, and supervised post-production. I also contributed to the development of the promotional package, including content cuts, idents, soundtrack curation, and the structure for video and social media extensions.

seo.metaDescription: Executive Producer and Showrunner for 8-episode Jazz documentary series produced during pandemic with zero COVID cases.

title: Flavor that Moves Traditions
what: A branded content series created to communicate Bohemia's concept 'Flavor that Moves Traditions.' The project aimed to reinforce the positioning of Brazil's first brewery as both historic and contemporary, connecting the brand to living cultural traditions such as the Northeastern São João festival and Rio de Janeiro's passinho dance movement. Developed during the pandemic, the series brought together influential personalities from these cultural scenes to share their perspectives and expand brand conversations in digital environments.
myRole: I acted as Production and Content Manager, leading both creative and production teams in building the brand's digital presence through localized, platform-specific content. I oversaw scripting, pre-production and post-production, remote filming operations, casting preparation, and supplier coordination. I supervised the development of the graphic package based on conceptual art direction, including motion design and promotional assets, ensuring narrative consistency and cohesive execution across all deliverables.

seo.metaTitle: Flavor that Moves Traditions - Bohemia | Caio Fochetto
seo.metaDescription: Production Manager connecting Brazil's first brewery with living cultural traditions through branded content series.

title: Cozinha de Emergência
what: A branded content pilot developed in partnership with Nestlé, designed to engage younger audiences through practical recipes inspired by everyday 'emergency' situations. The concept combined humor and cultural references with accessible cooking solutions, addressing relatable scenarios such as having almost nothing in the fridge, navigating emotional moments, or preparing a last-minute meal for a spontaneous date. The campaign was structured around four main hero videos, each featuring three recipes, supported by shorter, call-to-action driven cutdowns designed to drive traffic and expand reach across platforms, including Instagram Reels.
myRole: I acted as Production and Project Manager, leading the development of the content proposal in collaboration with commercial and editorial teams. I oversaw budgeting, contract structuring, production timelines, and supplier coordination. I supervised scripting, pre-production, production, and post-production processes, ensuring operational efficiency and creative consistency. I also guided the multiplatform rollout strategy, structuring short-form assets to maximize reach and funnel audiences toward the main episodic content.

seo.metaTitle: Cozinha de Emergência - Nestlé | Caio Fochetto
seo.metaDescription: Project Manager for Nestlé's youth-focused cooking series with multiplatform funnel strategy.
